title: JsonExport
description: Convert nested JSON to Excel/CSV with auto-unescape & smart flattening. Handles 100MB files — all client-side, zero server.
details: Client-side Next.js app with Monaco editor, smart flattening, and instant exports (CSV, Excel, HTML, ZIP). Privacy-first: all parsing runs locally; handles 100MB files smoothly.

images.caption: JsonExport Banner showcasing the primary value proposition.
Export panel showing options for CSV, Excel, HTML, and ZIP downloads.
Data Grid UI visualizing the parsed and flattened JSON arrays.
Data Grid UI visualizing the parsed and flattened JSON arrays.

title: 49Blox — Digital Music Collectibles
description: Platform where fans own fractional music rights. Live orderbook, secondary marketplace, and artist dashboards.
details: Full-stack marketplace for tokenized music assets. Users buy, sell, and trade shares of songs with real-time pricing and portfolio tracking.

images.caption: Platform dashboard displaying digital music collectibles and ownership stakes.
Primary orderbook and pricing graph for a tokenized song.
Secondary marketplace view where users can trade their music asset shares.

title: Universal Undo
description: The Ctrl+Z your Android never had. Shake to undo any deleted text, in any app. Works system-wide, runs 100% offline, under 3MB.
details: System-wide undo for Android. Monitors text fields via Accessibility, saves keystrokes locally in RAM, and lets you shake to restore. Supports WhatsApp, Gmail, Telegram, Keep, and more. No internet permission, no root required.

images.caption: Live service status and quick controls at a glance.
Trigger mode, history limits, and notification settings.
Simple onboarding guide for enabling and using undo.
Exclude sensitive apps from undo history.
Browse and restore prior text states with timestamps.
Privacy commitments and support links.

title: CameraInterceptor
description: Swap any Android camera feed with custom imagery. Hooks legacy Camera, Camera2, and CameraX APIs system-wide.
details: LSPosed module that intercepts all camera APIs (legacy, Camera2, CameraX) to inject gallery images system-wide. Built for Android 8.0+ with toggleable per-app profiles and stealth modes.

title: SMS Hook Module
description: Intercepts and augments outgoing SMS at the framework level with smart appends and stealth modes.
details: Adds smart text appends, multipart handling, and stealth modes across apps — built on LSPosed with focus on stability and safety.

images.caption: Real-time system log interception view
Module configuration and stealth settings

title: Coddle
description: Wordle for coders — guess the programming term. Color-coded feedback, streak tracking, and shareable results.
details: Vue-based word game where players guess coding terms. Features animated tile reveals, win/loss statistics, streak tracking, and a shareable results modal.

images.caption: The initial state of the Coddle game board showing empty tiles ready for user input.
Gameplay view demonstrating the color-coded feedback when an incorrect guess is submitted.
Victory modal displaying the user's statistics, streak, and a shareable summary after guessing the correct coding term.

title: Product Listing Optimizer
description: Chrome extension that grades product pages and suggests high-converting keywords for Amazon & Shopify.
details: Analyses Amazon/Shopify pages client-side, flags attribute gaps, and offers AI-assisted copy suggestions. Ships with promo creatives for Chrome Web Store.

images.caption: Product Listing Optimizer promotional banner.
Chrome Web Store large promotional graphic demonstrating the grading functionality.
Chrome Web Store small promo banner.

title: Dainty Proofreader
description: AI-powered proofreading tool that polishes your text with context-aware suggestions.
details: Web-based proofreader that uses AI to check grammar, style, and tone. Built for writers who want clean copy without the complexity of enterprise tools.

title: This Portfolio
description: The site you're looking at. Purpose-built to showcase projects without heavy frameworks — 100/100 Lighthouse.
details: Vite + vanilla JS, animated filters, modal slideshows, and a responsive design that loads in under a second. No React, no dependencies.
